verses.text: Lots are cast to bring one in ten to live in Jerusalem, and the people bless those who willingly offer to dwell there. Living in the holy but exposed city was a sacrifice. God honours those who freely take the harder post for the good of His people.

Lots are cast to bring one in ten to live in Jerusalem, and the people bless those who willingly offer to dwell there. Living in the holy but exposed city was a sacrifice. God honours those who freely take the harder post for the good of His people.

The chiefs and families who settle in Jerusalem are named — of Judah, Benjamin, the priests, Levites, and gatekeepers. Each willing dweller is recorded. God notes by name those who give themselves to serve where He has placed them.

The rest of the people settle in the villages of Judah and Benjamin, each in his inheritance. The land is repopulated household by household. God restores His people to their places, that the whole land may again be theirs.
